pages.text:
LendBridge Capital Corp.
Q2 2025 Performance Review

Period Ended: Q2 2025

LendBridge Capital Corp. ("LendBridge") is a specialty finance platform providing working capital lines to SMEs across North
America. Revenue is generated through interest income, fees, and ancillary treasury services.

Condensed Income Summary

| Item | Q2 2025 |
| --- | --- |
| Recognized Revenue | $12.7M |
| Interest Expense | ($3.4M) |
| Net Interest Margin | 9.4% |
| Fee&Other Income | $1.1M |
| Gross Margin | 62% |
| Pre-Provision Operating Margin | 34% |
| Provision Coverage Ratio | 2.4x |

Credit Portfolio Indicators

Portfolio Sector Mix – Q2 2025

| Metric | Q2 2025 |
| --- | --- |
| Total Loan Book (gross) | $316M |
| Active Borrowers | 1,420 |
| Average Loan Size | $84k |
| Net Charge-off Rate(LTM) | 3.1% |
| Balance Sheet Leverage | 2.7x |
| Senior Covenant Headroom | +148bps |
| Total Headcount | 188 |

Provision Coverage Ratio of 2.4x represents total loan loss reserves as a multiple of LTM net charge-offs. Management introduced
this metric in Q2 2025 to provide additional visibility into reserve adequacy. The ratio is above the board-approved minimum of

* * *

2.0x.

## Non-Core & One-Time Items

- Non-cash fair value adjustment on warrant portfolio: +$0.6M
- One-time legal settlement expense accrual: ($0.3M)
- Reported basic EPS for the period: $0.11 (unaudited)
  _(1) Net Charge-off Rate is on a last-twelve-months (LTM) basis; equivalent to 'Credit Loss Rate' used in Q3–Q4 2024._ _(2) Pre-Provision Operating Margin reinstated per updated board reporting policy; equivalent to 'Adjusted Operating Margin' in Q3 2024._ _(3) Provision Coverage Ratio = total loan loss reserves / LTM net charge-offs; introduced Q2 2025._ _(4) Gross Margin reflects interest income net of cost of funds; excludes provisions and operating expenses._
